searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Create your first DocРђІ
searchDocs.content: Create a Markdown file at docs/hello.md:  docs/hello.md # Hello This is my **first Docusaurus document**!   A new document is now available at http://localhost:3000/docs/hello.

searchDocs.title: Configure the SidebarРђІ
searchDocs.content: Docusaurus automatically creates a sidebar from the docs folder.  Add metadata to customize the sidebar label and position:  docs/hello.md --- sidebar_label: 'Hi!' sidebar_position: 3 --- # Hello This is my **first Docusaurus document**!   It is also possible to create your sidebar explicitly in sidebars.js:  sidebars.js export default { tutorialSidebar: [ 'intro', 'hello', { type: 'category', label: 'Tutorial', items: ['tutorial-basics/create-a-document'], }, ], };

searchDocs.title: Manage Docs Versions
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Create a docs versionРђІ
searchDocs.content: Release a version 1.0 of your project:  npm run docusaurus docs:version 1.0   The docs folder is copied into versioned_docs/version-1.0 and versions.json is created.  Your docs now have 2 versions:  1.0 at http://localhost:3000/docs/ for the version 1.0 docscurrent at http://localhost:3000/docs/next/ for the upcoming, unreleased docs

searchDocs.title: Add a Version DropdownРђІ
searchDocs.content: To navigate seamlessly across versions, add a version dropdown.  Modify the docusaurus.config.js file:  docusaurus.config.js export default { themeConfig: { navbar: { items: [ { type: 'docsVersionDropdown', }, ], }, }, };   The docs version dropdown appears in your navbar:

searchDocs.title: Update an existing versionРђІ
searchDocs.content: It is possible to edit versioned docs in their respective folder:  versioned_docs/version-1.0/hello.md updates http://localhost:3000/docs/hellodocs/hello.md updates http://localhost:3000/docs/next/hello

searchDocs.title: Markdown Features
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Front MatterРђІ
searchDocs.content: Markdown documents have metadata at the top called Front Matter:  my-doc.md --- id: my-doc-id title: My document title description: My document description slug: /my-custom-url --- ## Markdown heading Markdown text with [links](./hello.md)

searchDocs.title: LinksРђІ
searchDocs.content: Regular Markdown links are supported, using url paths or relative file paths.  Let's see how to [Create a page](/create-a-page).   Let's see how to [Create a page](./create-a-page.md).   Result: Let's see how to Create a page.

searchDocs.title: ImagesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Regular Markdown images are supported.  You can use absolute paths to reference images in the static directory (static/img/docusaurus.png):  ![Docusaurus logo](/img/docusaurus.png)     You can reference images relative to the current file as well. This is particularly useful to colocate images close to the Markdown files using them:  ![Docusaurus logo](./img/docusaurus.png)

searchDocs.title: Code BlocksРђІ
searchDocs.content: Markdown code blocks are supported with Syntax highlighting.  ```jsx title="src/components/HelloDocusaurus.js" function HelloDocusaurus() { return <h1>Hello, Docusaurus!</h1>; } ```   src/components/HelloDocusaurus.js function HelloDocusaurus() { return <h1>Hello, Docusaurus!</h1>; }

searchDocs.title: AdmonitionsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Docusaurus has a special syntax to create admonitions and callouts:  :::tip[My tip] Use this awesome feature option ::: :::danger[Take care] This action is dangerous :::   My tip Use this awesome feature option  Take care This action is dangerous

searchDocs.title: MDX and React ComponentsРђІ
searchDocs.content: MDX can make your documentation more interactive and allows using any React components inside Markdown:  export const Highlight = ({children, color}) => ( <span style={{ backgroundColor: color, borderRadius: '20px', color: '#fff', padding: '10px', cursor: 'pointer', }} onClick={() => { alert(`You clicked the color ${color} with label ${children}`) }}> {children} </span> ); This is <Highlight color="#25c2a0">Docusaurus green</Highlight> ! This is <Highlight color="#1877F2">Facebook blue</Highlight> !     This is Docusaurus green !  This is Facebook blue !

searchDocs.title: сЂіт«бТДў Web сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝тЂ┤сЂ«УеГт«џ
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: ТюгсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂДсЂ»сђЂQA ZERO сѓњТГБтИИсЂФтІЋСйюсЂЋсЂЏсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂФсђЂсЂіт«бТДўтЂ┤сЂ« Web сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сЂДт┐ЁУдЂсЂесЂфсѓІУеГт«џсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдУфгТўјсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  QA ZERO сЂ»сђЂУеѕТИгт»ЙУ▒АсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂежђџС┐АсѓњУАїсЂёсђЂ HTML тЈќтЙЌсѓё JavaScript сѓ┐сѓ░сЂ«т«ЪУАїсЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓњтЈјжЏєсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЮсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсђЂWeb сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝тЂ┤сЂ«УеГт«џтєЁт«╣сЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдсЂ»сђЂ СИђжЃеТЕЪУЃйсЂїТГБтИИсЂФтІЋСйюсЂЌсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: УеѕТИгт»ЙУ▒АсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂИсЂ«сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣Уе▒тЈ»№╝ѕт┐Ёжаѕ№╝ЅРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂДсЂ»сђЂУеѕТИгт»ЙУ▒АсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂ« HTML сѓњтЈќтЙЌсЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂДсђЂ УЄфтІЋтцЅТЏ┤т▒ЦТГ┤сЂ«Уеўжї▓сѓёУДБТъљтЄдуљєсѓњУАїсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЮсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсђЂС╗ЦСИІсЂ«ТЮАС╗ХсѓњТ║ђсЂЪсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  QA ZERO т░јтЁЦсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂІсѓЅсЂ«сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сѓњУе▒тЈ»сЂЎсѓІУеѕТИгт»ЙУ▒АсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂ« тЁесЃџсЃ╝сѓИ сЂїтЈќтЙЌтЈ»УЃйсЂДсЂѓсѓІсЂЊсЂе  IP тѕХжЎљсѓёсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣тѕХтЙАсѓњУАїсЂБсЂдсЂёсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ QA ZERO сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅсЂ«сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сЂїжЂ«ТќГсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёсЂІсђЂС║ІтЅЇсЂФуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: CDN / сѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦУеГт«џсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂд№╝ѕжЄЇУдЂ№╝ЅРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂ«УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂІсѓЅтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЋсѓїсѓІСИђжЃесЂ«сЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдсЂ»сђЂ CDN сѓёсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЂ«т»ЙУ▒АсЂІсѓЅжЎцтцќсЂЎсѓІт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  С╗ЦСИІсЂ«сЃЉсѓ╣сЂ»сђЂсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦжЎцтцќУеГт«џсѓњУАїсЂБсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/js/{tracking_id}/qtag.js /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/qahm-zero-ajax.php /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/qtag.php?tracking_id={tracking_id}   Рђ╗ {tracking_id} сЂ»сђЂуњ░тбЃсЂћсЂесЂФуЋ░сЂфсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЊсѓїсѓЅсЂ«сЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсЂїсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂесђЂ УеѕТИгсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂїТГБсЂЌсЂЈжђЂС┐АсЂЋсѓїсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: JavaScript сЂ«тюДуИ«сЃ╗ТюђжЂЕтїќУеГт«џсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: СИђжЃесЂ« CDN сѓёсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сЂДсЂ»сђЂ JavaScript сЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсЂФт»ЙсЂЌсЂд УЄфтІЋуџёсЂФтюДуИ«№╝ѕminify№╝ЅтЄдуљєсЂїУАїсѓЈсѓїсѓІта┤тљѕсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  QA ZERO сЂ«УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдсЂ»сђЂ minify тЄдуљєсЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ«СИђжЃесЂїТГБсЂЌсЂЈтІЋСйюсЂЌсЂфсЂЈсЂфсѓІсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓ╣сЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  JavaScript сЂ«УЄфтІЋтюДуИ«ТЕЪУЃйсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂС║ІтЅЇсЂФтІЋСйюуб║УфЇсѓњУАїсЂБсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂётЋЈжАїсЂїуЎ║ућЪсЂЎсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂт»ЙУ▒АсЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсѓњтюДуИ«т»ЙУ▒АсЂІсѓЅжЎцтцќсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё

searchDocs.title: Google Tag Manager сѓњтѕЕућесЂЎсѓІта┤тљѕРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂ«УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ»сђЂGoogle Tag Manager№╝ѕGTM№╝ЅсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдУеГуй«сЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесѓњТјетЦесЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЃѕсЃфсѓгсЃ╝сЂ»сђїтѕЮТюЪтїќ№╝ѕInitialization№╝ЅсђЇсѓњТјетЦетЁесЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂДт«ЪУАїсЂЋсѓїсѓІсѓѕсЂєУеГт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё  GTM сѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ тЁесЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ« HTML сЂФуЏ┤ТјЦсѓ┐сѓ░сѓњтЪІсѓЂУЙ╝сѓђтйбсЂДсѓѓтѕЕућетЈ»УЃйсЂДсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсЃЌсЃЕсѓ░сѓцсЃ│сЃ╗WAF тѕЕућеТЎѓсЂ«Т│еТёЈуѓ╣РђІ
searchDocs.content: С╗ЦСИІсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂфТЕЪУЃйсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІта┤тљѕсђЂ QA ZERO сЂ«жђџС┐АсЂїжЂ«ТќГсЂЋсѓїсѓІтЈ»УЃйТђДсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБу│╗сЃЌсЃЕсѓ░сѓцсЃ│WAF№╝ѕWeb Application Firewall№╝ЅСИЇТГБсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣ТцюуЪЦТЕЪУЃй  т░јтЁЦтЙїсЂФУеѕТИгсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂїтЈќтЙЌсЂДсЂЇсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ сЂЊсѓїсѓЅсЂ«УеГт«џтєЁт«╣сѓњСИђт║дуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: тІЋСйюуб║УфЇсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: УеГт«џт«їС║єтЙїсЂ»сђЂт┐ЁсЂџ тІЋСйюуб║УфЇсѓњУАїсЂБсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂїТГБтИИсЂФУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сЂЙсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂІсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂїу«Ауљєућ╗жЮбсЂФтЈЇТўасЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂІ  тЋЈжАїсЂїуЎ║ућЪсЂЌсЂЪта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ УеГт«џтєЁт«╣сѓёсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣тѕХтЙАсѓњСИГт┐ЃсЂФтєЇуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: ТгАсЂФуб║УфЇсЂЎсЂ╣сЂЇсЃџсЃ╝сѓИРђІ
searchDocs.content: сЂіт«бТДў Web сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝тЂ┤сЂ«УеГт«џсѓњуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂЪтЙїсЂ»сђЂ С╗ЦСИІсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсѓњтЈѓуЁДсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  т░јтЁЦсЃЋсЃГсЃ╝сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐С┐ЮтГўсЃ╗сЃљсЃЃсѓ»сѓбсЃЃсЃЌжЂІућеСИісЂ«Т│еТёЈуѓ╣

searchDocs.title: Translate your site
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Configure i18nРђІ
searchDocs.content: Modify docusaurus.config.js to add support for the fr locale:  docusaurus.config.js export default { i18n: { defaultLocale: 'en', locales: ['en', 'fr'], }, };

searchDocs.title: Translate a docРђІ
searchDocs.content: Copy the docs/intro.md file to the i18n/fr folder:  mkdir -p i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/ cp docs/intro.md i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/intro.md   Translate i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/intro.md in French.

searchDocs.title: Start your localized siteРђІ
searchDocs.content: Start your site on the French locale:  npm run start -- --locale fr   Your localized site is accessible at http://localhost:3000/fr/ and the Getting Started page is translated.  Т│еТёЈ In development, you can only use one locale at a time.

searchDocs.title: Add a Locale DropdownРђІ
searchDocs.content: To navigate seamlessly across languages, add a locale dropdown.  Modify the docusaurus.config.js file:  docusaurus.config.js export default { themeConfig: { navbar: { items: [ { type: 'localeDropdown', }, ], }, }, };   The locale dropdown now appears in your navbar:

searchDocs.title: Build your localized siteРђІ
searchDocs.content: Build your site for a specific locale:  npm run build -- --locale fr   Or build your site to include all the locales at once:  npm run build

searchDocs.title: сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУдЂС╗Х
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: ТюгсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂДсЂ»сђЂQA ZERO сѓњт░јтЁЦсЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂФт┐ЁУдЂсЂесЂфсѓІсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕуњ░тбЃсЂ«тЅЇТЈљТЮАС╗ХсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдУфгТўјсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  QA ZERO сЂ»сђЂУеѕТИгтЄдуљєт░ѓућесЂ«сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сЂесЂЌсЂдУеГУеѕсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂ СИђУѕгуџёсЂфWebсѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сЂесЂ»уЋ░сЂфсѓІсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУдЂС╗ХсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  ТюгсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ»сђїт░јтЁЦтѕцТќГсЃ╗УеГУеѕсђЇсѓњуЏ«уџёсЂесЂЌсЂдсЂісѓісђЂ тЁиСйЊуџёсЂфсѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓёУеГт«џТЅІжаєсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдсЂ»сђЂтѕЦсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂДУфгТўјсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: AWS уњ░тбЃсЂ«тѕЕућесЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ

searchDocs.title: Heatmaps
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Types of HeatmapsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Click Heatmaps: Shows where users click on your pages with heat intensity visualizationClick Count Maps: Displays numerical click counts on interactive elementsScroll Heatmaps: Visualizes how far users scroll down your pagesAttention Maps: Shows which areas of your page receive the most user attentionReading Level Maps: Visualizes content consumption and reading patterns

searchDocs.title: Device-Specific ViewsРђІ
searchDocs.content: View heatmaps for different device types:  Desktop: Full-width view for desktop usersTablet: 768px width view for tablet usersMobile: 375px width view for mobile users

searchDocs.title: Advanced FilteringРђІ
searchDocs.content: Filter your heatmap data by:  Date Range: Custom date selection with calendar pickerTraffic Source: Filter by referral domainsUTM Parameters: Filter by campaign, medium, and sourceGoal Completion: Filter to show only sessions that completed specific goals

searchDocs.title: Generating HeatmapsРђІ
searchDocs.content: To generate a heatmap:  Navigate to the Heatmaps section in the QA ZERO dashboardSelect the page you want to analyzeChoose the device type (desktop, tablet, mobile)Select the heatmap type you want to viewSet the date range for data collectionApply any additional filters (source, campaign, goals)

searchDocs.title: Heatmap Analysis ToolsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO provides powerful tools for heatmap analysis:  Element Selectors: Identify specific HTML elements and their interaction metricsOverlay Controls: Toggle between different visualization typesVersion Comparison: Compare heatmaps across different page versionsData Export: Export heatmap data for further analysis

searchDocs.title: Analyzing HeatmapsРђІ
searchDocs.content: When analyzing heatmaps, look for:  Areas with high engagement and attentionClickable elements that aren't being clickedContent that users aren't seeing (below the scroll fold)Differences in behavior across device typesCorrelation between attention patterns and goal completionReading patterns and content consumption metrics

searchDocs.title: Session Recording
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: How Session Recording WorksРђІ
searchDocs.content: Session recording captures:  Mouse movements and cursor positionClicks and interactive elementsScrolling behavior and scroll depthPage navigation and multi-page journeysForm interactions and input fieldsTime spent on different sections of the pageBrowser resize events  All recordings are stored securely on your own server and can be accessed from your WordPress admin panel.

searchDocs.title: Viewing RecordingsРђІ
searchDocs.content: To view session recordings:  Navigate to the Session Recording section in the QA ZERO dashboardBrowse the list of available recordings with filtering optionsClick on a recording to play itUse the comprehensive playback controls: Play/PauseRewind/Fast-forwardPlayback speed adjustment (0.5x to 2x)Timeline scrubbingSession navigation between pages

searchDocs.title: User Information DisplayРђІ
searchDocs.content: Each recording provides detailed information about the visitor:  User Details: Anonymized ID, new/returning status, countryAccess Information: Landing time, referrer source, page view countDevice Information: Device type (desktop, tablet, mobile), operating system, browser

searchDocs.title: Session NavigationРђІ
searchDocs.content: For multi-page sessions, QA ZERO provides:  Visual playlist of all pages visited by the userThumbnails and titles for each page in the journeyAutomatic playback of the next page in sequenceDirect navigation to any point in the user journey

searchDocs.title: Analysis ToolsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO provides powerful tools for analyzing session recordings:  Filtering Options: Filter recordings by: Date rangeDevice typeTraffic sourceGoal completionPage URLSession duration Integration with Other Features: View heatmaps for the same pageAnalyze conversion pathsIdentify usability issuesCorrelate with analytics data

searchDocs.title: Privacy ConsiderationsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Session recording is designed with privacy in mind:  Sensitive data like passwords and credit card numbers are automatically maskedForm input fields can be selectively excluded from recordingYou can configure which pages to record and which to excludeUser consent options are available to comply with privacy regulationsAll data is stored on your own server, not transmitted to third parties

searchDocs.title: Goals
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Setting Up GoalsРђІ
searchDocs.content: To set up a goal:  Navigate to the Goals section in the QA ZERO dashboardClick "Add New Goal"Configure the goal parameters: Goal name and descriptionGoal value (for conversion value calculation)Completion target (monthly goal) Choose the goal type: Destination (specific page visit)Click (button/link interaction)Form submissionCustom event tracking Save the goal

searchDocs.title: Goal DashboardРђІ
searchDocs.content: The Goals dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of your conversion performance:  Goal completions count for each goalGoal value calculations based on completed conversionsConversion rate percentage for each goalComparison of actual completions against monthly targetsConversion trend charts with session volume overlay

searchDocs.title: Goal AnalysisРђІ
searchDocs.content: Analyze your goal performance with detailed breakdowns:

searchDocs.title: Source/Medium AnalysisРђІ
searchDocs.content: View which traffic sources drive the most conversionsCompare conversion rates across different referrersAnalyze user engagement metrics by sourceIdentify high-value traffic channels

searchDocs.title: Landing Page AnalysisРђІ
searchDocs.content: See which landing pages contribute to conversionsCompare new vs. returning user conversion ratesAnalyze bounce rates for converting pagesIdentify high-performing entry points

searchDocs.title: Visual Analysis ToolsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO provides visual tools to understand user behavior leading to conversions:

searchDocs.title: Heatmaps for Goal PagesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Click heatmaps showing interaction patternsDevice-specific heatmaps (desktop, tablet, mobile)Filter heatmaps by conversion goalIdentify click patterns that lead to conversions

searchDocs.title: Session RecordingРђІ
searchDocs.content: Replay actual user sessions that resulted in conversionsFilter recordings by specific goalsView the complete user journey from entry to conversionAnalyze user behavior patterns for successful conversions

searchDocs.title: Data Filtering and ExportРђІ
searchDocs.content: Customize your goal analysis with powerful filtering options:  Filter by custom date rangesSegment by device type (desktop, tablet, mobile)Filter by traffic source and mediumExport conversion data for further analysisGenerate reports with conversion metrics

searchDocs.title: License Activation
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Obtaining a License KeyРђІ
searchDocs.content: Before you can activate QA ZERO premium, you need to purchase a license:  Visit the QA ZERO websiteSelect your preferred license tierComplete the checkout processYou will receive your license key via emailThe license key will also be available in your account dashboard

searchDocs.title: Standard ActivationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Log in to your WordPress admin dashboardNavigate to QA ZERO > LicenseEnter your license key in the provided fieldEnter your email address in the provided fieldClick Activate the licenseIf successful, you'll see a confirmation message and a celebration animation

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting ActivationРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you encounter issues during activation:  Verify that you've entered the license key correctly (no extra spaces)Check your internet connectionEnsure your server can make outbound connectionsTemporarily disable security plugins or firewalls that might block the activation request  For more detailed troubleshooting, see the License Errors section.

searchDocs.title: Verifying ActivationРђІ
searchDocs.content: After activation, you can verify that your license is working correctly:  Navigate to QA ZERO > DashboardCheck that premium features are now availableTry accessing a premium feature like session recording

searchDocs.title: License InformationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Once activated, you can view your license information:  Navigate to QA ZERO > LicenseView your license details: Last authentication timeActivation status

searchDocs.title: Deactivating Your LicenseРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you need to move your license to another site:  Navigate to QA ZERO > LicenseClick Deactivate this licenseConfirm the deactivationYour license can now be activated on another site

searchDocs.title: "Invalid License Key" ErrorРђІ
searchDocs.content: This error occurs when:  The license key is entered incorrectlyThe license has expiredThe license has been revoked  Solution: Verify your license key and status in your QA ZERO account.

searchDocs.title: "License Activation Limit Reached" ErrorРђІ
searchDocs.content: This error occurs when:  You've activated the license on the maximum number of sites allowed by your license tierYou're trying to activate a license on too many sites  Solution: Deactivate the license on an unused site.

searchDocs.title: "Connection Error" During ActivationРђІ
searchDocs.content: This error occurs when:  Your server cannot connect to the QA ZERO license serverA firewall is blocking the connectionYour hosting has restrictions on outbound connections  Solution: Contact your hosting provider to ensure outbound connections are allowed.

searchDocs.title: Getting HelpРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you continue to experience activation issues:  Check the QA ZERO Knowledge Base for license-related articlesContact QA ZERO support with: Your license key (last 4 characters only for security)WordPress versionQA ZERO plugin versionError messages you're receivingSteps you've already taken to troubleshoot

searchDocs.title: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ№╝ѕсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕуЅѕ№╝Ѕ
searchDocs.content: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ№╝ѕсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕуЅѕ№╝Ѕ сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ»сђЂсЃЅсѓГсЃЦсЃАсЃ│сЃѕТДІТѕљсЂ«УдІуЏ┤сЂЌсЂФС╝┤сЂёуД╗тІЋсЂЌсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ ТюђТќ░сЂ«тєЁт«╣сЂ»сЂЊсЂАсѓЅсѓњсЂћуб║УфЇсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё№╝џ ­ЪЉЅAIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ№╝ѕсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕуЅѕ№╝Ѕ

searchDocs.title: Free vs Premium Features
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Feature ComparisonРђІ
searchDocs.content: The following table provides a comprehensive comparison of features available in the free and premium versions of QA ZERO:  Feature	Free Version	Premium VersionMeasured Pages	1 page only	Unlimited pages Analytics	Basic page views	Comprehensive analytics Heatmaps	Limited (click only)	All types (click, scroll, move, attention) Session Recording	РЮї	РюЁ Goal Tracking	Basic (1 goal)	Advanced (unlimited goals) Data Retention	30 days	Up to 1 year Export Options	Limited formats	All formats (CSV, TSV) Real-time Analytics	РЮї	РюЁ User Segmentation	РЮї	РюЁ Custom Reports	РЮї	РюЁ AI-powered Insights	РЮї	РюЁ Support	Community forum	Priority email support

searchDocs.title: Free Version DetailsРђІ
searchDocs.content: The free version of QA ZERO includes:

searchDocs.title: Measurement LimitationsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Limited to tracking 1 page only (based on the FREE_MEASURE_PAGE constant)Basic functionality for that single page

searchDocs.title: Analytics FeaturesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Basic page view trackingSimple visitor countBasic traffic sources

searchDocs.title: Heatmap FeaturesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Click heatmaps onlyLimited to 1 active pageData collection for 30 days

searchDocs.title: LimitationsРђІ
searchDocs.content: No session recordingNo AI-powered insightsLimited data export options (basic formats only)No custom reportsCommunity support only

searchDocs.title: Premium Version DetailsРђІ
searchDocs.content: The premium version of QA ZERO includes everything in the free version, plus:

searchDocs.title: Unlimited MeasurementРђІ
searchDocs.content: Track unlimited pages across your siteComprehensive data collection for all pagesFull site analytics and insights

searchDocs.title: Enhanced AnalyticsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Detailed visitor demographicsAdvanced traffic source analysisCustom date rangesUser flow visualizationConversion funnel analysis

searchDocs.title: Complete Heatmap SuiteРђІ
searchDocs.content: Click heatmapsScroll heatmapsMouse movement heatmapsAttention heatmapsClick count mapsUnlimited active heatmapsData retention up to 1 year

searchDocs.title: Session RecordingРђІ
searchDocs.content: Full visitor session recordingsSession filtering and searchEvent timelineTechnical informationMulti-page journey tracking

searchDocs.title: AI-powered InsightsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Automated data analysisTrend detectionAnomaly identificationActionable recommendationsPerformance predictions

searchDocs.title: Advanced FeaturesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Real-time analyticsUser segmentationCustom reportsData export in multiple formats (CSV, TSV)API access for data integration

searchDocs.title: Premium TiersРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO Premium is available in several tiers:

searchDocs.title: Personal TierРђІ
searchDocs.content: 1 websiteAll premium featuresEmail support1 year data retention

searchDocs.title: Business TierРђІ
searchDocs.content: 3 websitesAll premium featuresPriority support1 year data retentionAdvanced reporting

searchDocs.title: Business Plus TierРђІ
searchDocs.content: 5 websitesAll premium featuresPriority support1 year data retentionAdvanced reportingEnhanced data analysis

searchDocs.title: Agency TierРђІ
searchDocs.content: 10 websitesAll premium featuresDedicated support1 year data retentionClient management dashboard

searchDocs.title: Enterprise TierРђІ
searchDocs.content: Custom number of websitesAll premium featuresDedicated supportExtended data retentionCustom implementation

searchDocs.title: Choosing the Right VersionРђІ
searchDocs.content: The free version is ideal for:  Small websites with only one important page to trackBlog owners who want simple insights for a single pageUsers who want to try QA ZERO before upgrading  The premium version is recommended for:  Websites needing to track multiple pagesBusiness websites focused on conversion optimizationE-commerce sites needing detailed user behavior analysisMarketing professionals requiring comprehensive analyticsTeams wanting AI-powered insights and recommendationsAgencies managing multiple client websites

searchDocs.title: Upgrading to PremiumРђІ
searchDocs.content: Ready to upgrade to QA ZERO Premium? Follow these steps:  Navigate to QA ZERO > License in your WordPress adminClick Upgrade to PremiumSelect your preferred premium tierComplete the checkout processYour license key will be automatically applied  For more information about activating your premium license, see the License Activation guide.

searchDocs.title: Subscription Management
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Understanding Your SubscriptionРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO premium licenses are subscription-based, with options for:  Annual billing (most popular)Monthly billingMulti-year billing (2-3 years with discount)  Your subscription includes:  Access to premium featuresPlugin updatesTechnical supportLicense management

searchDocs.title: Viewing Subscription DetailsРђІ
searchDocs.content: To view your current subscription details:  Log in to your QA ZERO account at https://qazero.com/account/Navigate to the Subscriptions sectionView your subscription information: Plan type (Personal, Business, Agency)Billing cycle (monthly, annual, multi-year)Next billing datePayment methodSubscription history

searchDocs.title: Automatic RenewalРђІ
searchDocs.content: By default, QA ZERO subscriptions are set to renew automatically:  You will receive email notifications 7 days and 3 days before the renewal dateThe renewal will use the payment method on fileYour license will continue without interruptionA receipt will be emailed to you after the renewal is processed

searchDocs.title: Manual RenewalРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you've disabled automatic renewal:  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionClick Renew next to the expiring subscriptionSelect your renewal termComplete the checkout process

searchDocs.title: Renewal DiscountsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO offers loyalty discounts for renewals:  15% discount for 1-year renewals25% discount for 2-year renewals35% discount for 3-year renewals

searchDocs.title: Upgrading Your PlanРђІ
searchDocs.content: To upgrade to a higher tier (e.g., from Personal to Business):  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionClick Upgrade next to your current subscriptionSelect your new plan tierReview the prorated amount (credit for unused portion of current subscription)Complete the checkout processYour license will be immediately upgraded

searchDocs.title: Downgrading Your PlanРђІ
searchDocs.content: To downgrade to a lower tier:  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionClick Change PlanSelect a lower tierChoose when to apply the change: Immediately (prorated refund issued)At next renewal date (current plan remains active until then) Confirm your selection  Note that downgrading may result in loss of access to certain features and reduced site limits.

searchDocs.title: Changing Billing CycleРђІ
searchDocs.content: To change from monthly to annual billing (or vice versa):  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionClick Change Billing CycleSelect your preferred cycleReview the price adjustmentConfirm the change

searchDocs.title: Adding a Payment MethodРђІ
searchDocs.content: Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Payment Methods sectionClick Add Payment MethodEnter your payment detailsSet as default if desiredSave the payment method

searchDocs.title: Updating a Payment MethodРђІ
searchDocs.content: Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Payment Methods sectionFind the payment method you want to updateClick EditUpdate the informationSave changes

searchDocs.title: Removing a Payment MethodРђІ
searchDocs.content: Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Payment Methods sectionFind the payment method you want to removeClick DeleteConfirm deletion  Note: You cannot delete a payment method that is currently being used for an active subscription.

searchDocs.title: Cancellation ProcessРђІ
searchDocs.content: To cancel your QA ZERO subscription:  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionClick Cancel SubscriptionSelect a reason for cancellation (optional but helpful)Choose when to cancel: Immediately (prorated refund may be issued)At the end of the current billing period Confirm cancellation

searchDocs.title: What Happens After CancellationРђІ
searchDocs.content: After cancelling your subscription:  You will receive a confirmation emailIf cancelled immediately: Premium features will be disabledYour site will revert to the free versionCollected data will be retained for 30 days If cancelled at the end of the billing period: Premium features will remain active until that dateYou will receive a reminder email before features are disabled

searchDocs.title: Reactivating a Cancelled SubscriptionРђІ
searchDocs.content: To reactivate a cancelled subscription:  Log in to your QA ZERO accountNavigate to the Subscriptions sectionFind your cancelled subscriptionClick ReactivateConfirm reactivation  If reactivated within 30 days, your previous settings and data will be restored.

searchDocs.title: Can I use my license on multiple sites?РђІ
searchDocs.content: Personal tier: 1 site onlyBusiness tier: Up to 3 sitesAgency tier: Up to 10 sites

searchDocs.title: What happens if my payment fails?РђІ
searchDocs.content: We will attempt to process the payment again after 3 daysYou will receive email notifications about the failed paymentAfter three failed attempts, your subscription will be pausedYou will have a 15-day grace period to update your payment information

searchDocs.title: Can I get a refund?РђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO offers a 14-day money-back guarantee. Contact support within 14 days of purchase for a full refund.

searchDocs.title: How do I get an invoice for my subscription?РђІ
searchDocs.content: Invoices are automatically emailed after each payment. You can also download them from the Billing History section of your account.

searchDocs.title: Getting HelpРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you have questions about your subscription:  Check the Billing FAQContact the billing team at billing@qazero.comUse the live chat on the QA ZERO website during business hours

searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂФсЂ»сђЂсЃЌсЃЕсѓцсЃљсѓисЃ╝УдЈтѕХсЂИсЂ«т»Йт┐юсѓњТћ»ТЈ┤сЂЎсѓІТЕЪУЃйсЂїтљФсЂЙсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  IPтї┐тљЇтїќCookieтљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂесЂ«жђБТљ║сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐С┐ЮТїЂу«АуљєсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓесѓ»сѓ╣сЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕТЕЪУЃй  тЁиСйЊуџёсЂфт»Йт┐юТќ╣Т│ЋсЂ»сђЂт░јтЁЦуњ░тбЃсѓёжЂІућеТќ╣жЄЮсЂФт┐юсЂўсЂдУеГт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: Q. QA ZEROсЂ»CookieсѓњСй┐ућесЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсЂІ№╝ЪРђІ

searchDocs.title: Plugin Compatibility
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Compatible Caching PluginsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO works well with most popular caching plugins, including:  WP RocketW3 Total CacheWP Super CacheLiteSpeed CacheAutoptimize

searchDocs.title: Potential IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Caching plugins may cache the QA ZERO tracking code, which can lead to inaccurate data collection. To prevent this:  Exclude QA ZERO Scripts: Configure your caching plugin to exclude QA ZERO JavaScript files from being cached or minified.Dynamic Content: Ensure your caching plugin is configured to handle dynamic content correctly.

searchDocs.title: Configuration StepsРђІ
searchDocs.content: WP RocketРђІ  Go to WP Rocket > Advanced RulesAdd the following to the "Never Cache URLs" section: /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/ Add the following to the "Excluded JavaScript Files" section: /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/js/ Save changes  W3 Total CacheРђІ  Go to Performance > MinifyAdd the following to the "Never minify the following JS files" section: /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/js/ Save changes

searchDocs.title: Compatible Security PluginsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO is compatible with most security plugins, including:  WordfenceSucuriiThemes SecurityAll In One WP Security

searchDocs.title: Potential IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Some security plugins may block QA ZERO's data collection as suspicious activity. To prevent this:  Whitelist QA ZERO: Add QA ZERO's scripts and API endpoints to your security plugin's whitelist.Adjust Firewall Rules: Modify firewall rules to allow QA ZERO's necessary operations.

searchDocs.title: Configuration StepsРђІ
searchDocs.content: WordfenceРђІ  Go to Wordfence > FirewallClick on "Allowlisted URLs"Add the following patterns: /wp-content/plugins/qa-zero/ /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php Save changes

searchDocs.title: Compatible SEO PluginsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO works well with all major SEO plugins, including:  Yoast SEORank MathAll in One SEOSEOPress  No special configuration is typically needed for SEO plugins.

searchDocs.title: Compatible Page BuildersРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO is compatible with popular page builders, including:  ElementorBeaver BuilderDivi BuilderWPBakery Page BuilderGutenberg (WordPress Block Editor)

searchDocs.title: Potential IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Some page builders may use custom JavaScript that conflicts with QA ZERO's tracking. If you notice issues:  Test in Safe Mode: Many page builders offer a safe mode or debug mode. Test QA ZERO with this enabled.Update to Latest Versions: Ensure both QA ZERO and your page builder are updated to the latest versions.

searchDocs.title: Compatible Form PluginsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO works with most form plugins, including:  Contact Form 7WPFormsGravity FormsNinja FormsFormidable Forms

searchDocs.title: Special Integration FeaturesРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO can track form submissions as conversion goals:  Navigate to QA ZERO > GoalsClick Add New GoalSelect "Form Submission" as the goal typeSelect your form plugin and specific formSave the goal

searchDocs.title: Compatible PluginsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO is compatible with:  WooCommerceEasy Digital DownloadsMemberPressLearnDashWP-Members

searchDocs.title: Special Integration FeaturesРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO offers enhanced tracking for e-commerce activities:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > IntegrationsEnable the integration for your e-commerce or membership pluginConfigure tracking options for purchases, registrations, or course completions

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting Plugin ConflictsРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you suspect a plugin conflict with QA ZERO:  Temporarily Disable Plugins: Disable other plugins one by one to identify which one is causing the conflict.Check Browser Console: Look for JavaScript errors in your browser's developer console.Update All Plugins: Ensure all plugins are updated to their latest versions.Contact Support: If you can't resolve the issue, contact QA ZERO support with details about the conflict.  For specific plugin conflict issues not covered here, please refer to the Troubleshooting section.

searchDocs.title: Site Performance
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Performance ImpactРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO's impact on site performance is typically minimal:  The tracking script is lightweight (< 50KB)Scripts load asynchronously to avoid blocking page renderingData is sent to the server in the backgroundProcessing occurs on the server, not in the user's browser

searchDocs.title: Measured ImpactРђІ
searchDocs.content: In our testing across various website types:  Metric	Average ImpactPage Load Time	+0.1 to 0.3 seconds First Contentful Paint	Negligible Time to Interactive	Negligible Lighthouse Performance Score	-1 to -3 points

searchDocs.title: Basic OptimizationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceEnable Optimize Script LoadingSet Tracking Precision to "Balanced" (default)Save changes

searchDocs.title: Advanced OptimizationРђІ
searchDocs.content: For sites where performance is critical:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceEnable Minimal Tracking ModeConfigure which tracking features to enable/disable: Click TrackingScroll TrackingMouse Movement TrackingSession Recording Save changes  Note that disabling certain tracking features will limit the data available in your reports.

searchDocs.title: Caching CompatibilityРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO is designed to work with caching plugins:  The tracking script includes cache-busting parametersUser-specific data is handled via cookies and localStorageThe admin interface is automatically excluded from caching  For optimal performance with caching:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Cache Compatibility ModeSave changes  See the Plugin Compatibility section for specific caching plugin configurations.

searchDocs.title: CDN CompatibilityРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO works with Content Delivery Networks (CDNs):  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceEnable CDN CompatibilityIf your CDN requires specific configuration, enter the details in the provided fieldsSave changes

searchDocs.title: Database OptimizationРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO stores collected data in your WordPress database. To optimize database performance:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > DatabaseConfigure Data Retention Period (shorter periods mean less database storage)Set Database Cleanup Schedule (daily, weekly, or monthly)Enable Database Optimization to automatically optimize tablesSave changes

searchDocs.title: Reducing Server LoadРђІ
searchDocs.content: For high-traffic websites:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceEnable Sampling Mode to track only a percentage of visitorsConfigure the sampling rate (e.g., 50% means only half of visitors are tracked)Enable Rate Limiting to prevent traffic spikes from overwhelming your serverSave changes

searchDocs.title: Mobile OptimizationРђІ
searchDocs.content: To optimize performance for mobile users:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceEnable Mobile OptimizationConfigure Mobile Tracking Level (Full, Balanced, or Minimal)Save changes

searchDocs.title: Performance MonitoringРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO includes tools to monitor its own performance impact:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > PerformanceView the Performance Impact sectionCheck the Script Load Time and Processing Time metricsIf these values are higher than the benchmarks, consider applying the optimization techniques described above

searchDocs.title: Best PracticesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Start with default settings and optimize only if neededUse sampling for high-traffic sites (100,000+ monthly pageviews)Regularly check performance metrics in your hosting dashboardConsider upgrading hosting if your site is already resource-constrainedBalance data collection needs with performance requirements

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting Performance IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you notice performance issues after installing QA ZERO:  Temporarily disable QA ZERO to confirm it's the source of the problemEnable Debug Mode in QA ZERO settings to identify specific issuesCheck browser console for JavaScript errorsReview server logs for PHP errors or slow queriesContact QA ZERO support if issues persist after applying optimization techniques  For persistent performance issues, please refer to the Troubleshooting section.

searchDocs.title: Theme Layout Issues
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Heatmap Overlay MisalignmentРђІ
searchDocs.content: The most common theme-related issue is misalignment between the heatmap overlay and the actual website content.    Possible causes:  Dynamic Content: Elements that load after the initial page load (sliders, lazy-loaded images)Responsive Layouts: Themes that significantly alter layout across different screen sizesCustom Positioning: Elements with absolute or fixed positioningiFrames: Content loaded within iFrames

searchDocs.title: Solution StepsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Delayed Tracking and set the delay to 2-3 secondsEnable Enhanced Element TrackingSave changes and test the heatmap again  For persistent issues:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedIn the Custom Code section, add the following JavaScript: window.qaZeroConfig = { adjustForDynamicContent: true, trackingDelay: 2500, resizeThrottle: 500 }; Save changes and test the heatmap again

searchDocs.title: WordPress Default ThemesРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO works well with all default WordPress themes (Twenty Twenty, Twenty Twenty-One, etc.) without any special configuration.

searchDocs.title: Popular Theme FrameworksРђІ
searchDocs.content: DiviРђІ  For Divi themes:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Divi Compatibility ModeSave changes  AvadaРђІ  For Avada themes:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Fusion Builder CompatibilitySave changes  AstraРђІ  For Astra themes:  Ensure you're using Astra 3.0 or higherNo special configuration is typically needed  GeneratePressРђІ  QA ZERO works well with GeneratePress without any special configuration.

searchDocs.title: Fixing Z-index IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Some themes use high z-index values that may cause elements to appear above the QA ZERO interface.  To fix this:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Force Interface LayerAdjust the Interface Z-Index value if needed (default is 9999)Save changes

searchDocs.title: Handling Custom Post TypesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If your theme uses custom post types with unique layouts:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > TrackingUnder Content Types, ensure your custom post types are selectedClick Advanced SettingsConfigure tracking settings specifically for each custom post typeSave changes

searchDocs.title: Mobile Theme CompatibilityРђІ
searchDocs.content: If your site uses a separate mobile theme or significantly different mobile layout:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedEnable Enhanced Mobile TrackingConfigure the Mobile Breakpoint value to match your theme's mobile breakpointSave changes

searchDocs.title: AMP Pages CompatibilityРђІ
searchDocs.content: For themes that support AMP (Accelerated Mobile Pages):  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > IntegrationsEnable AMP Compatibility ModeChoose whether to track AMP pages separately or combine with regular page dataSave changes

searchDocs.title: Custom Theme HooksРђІ
searchDocs.content: If your theme uses custom action hooks for header and footer:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedIn the Custom Hooks section, enter your theme's header and footer hook namesSave changes

searchDocs.title: Testing After Theme UpdatesРђІ
searchDocs.content: After updating your theme:  Visit your website and check that QA ZERO tracking is still workingView a heatmap to ensure proper alignmentTest on multiple devices to ensure responsive compatibility  If issues occur after a theme update:  Navigate to QA ZERO > Settings > AdvancedClick Reset Compatibility SettingsFollow the setup wizard to reconfigure theme compatibility

searchDocs.title: Getting Help with Theme IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you continue to experience theme-related issues:  Check if your theme has specific documentation for analytics plugin compatibilityContact your theme developer to ask about compatibility with heatmap and analytics toolsContact QA ZERO support with details about your theme and the specific issues you're experiencing

searchDocs.title: сЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌсЂ«сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐жЏєУеѕсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂд

searchDocs.title: Q. уЏ«ТеЎућ╗жЮбсЂ«сђїсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│ТЋ░сђЇсЂесђЂсЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌућ╗жЮбсЂ«сђїсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐ТЋ░сђЇсЂїСИђУЄ┤сЂЌсЂфсЂёсЂ«сЂ»сЂфсЂюсЂДсЂЎсЂІ№╝ЪРђІ

searchDocs.title: уЏ«ТеЎућ╗жЮбсЂ«сђїсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сђЇсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: уЏ«ТеЎућ╗жЮбсЂ«УАесЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІсђїсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сђЇсЂ»сђЂ т«ЪжџЏсЂФсЂ» сЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂїУеўжї▓сЂЋсѓїсЂЪсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝№╝ѕPV№╝ЅТЋ░сЂ«тљѕУеѕ сѓњУАеуц║сЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЃЕсЃЎсЃФСИісЂ»сђїсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сђЇсЂесЂфсЂБсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсЂїсђЂ тєЁжЃетЄдуљєсЂДсЂ» сЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌт»ЙУ▒АсЂесЂфсѓІТюЅті╣PVТЋ░ сѓњжЏєУеѕсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌућ╗жЮбсЂ«сђїсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐ТЋ░сђЇсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: сЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌућ╗жЮбсЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІсђїсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐ТЋ░сђЇсѓѓсђЂ сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝№╝ѕPV№╝ЅтЇўСйЇсЂ«сЃГсѓ░ТЋ░ сѓњсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЪсЂасЂЌсђЂС╗ЦСИІсЂ«уљєућ▒сЂФсѓѕсѓісђЂуЏ«ТеЎућ╗жЮбсЂ«ТЋ░тђцсѓѕсѓітцџсЂЈУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІта┤тљѕсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  тљїСИђсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│тєЁсЂДсЂ«УцЄТЋ░тЏъжќ▓УдД 1С║║сЂ«сЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝№╝ѕ1сѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│№╝ЅсЂїт»ЙУ▒АсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсѓњ3тЏъжќ▓УдДсЂЌсЂЪта┤тљѕсђЂ сѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│ТЋ░сЂ»сђї1сђЇсЂДсЂЎсЂїсђЂсЃњсЃ╝сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃЌсЂ«сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ»сђї3сђЇсЂесЂЌсЂдУЊёуЕЇсЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ сЃЕсЃЎсЃФсЂ«т«џуЙЕсЂ«жЂЋсЂё у«Ауљєућ╗жЮбсЂ«УАесЂДсЂ»СЙ┐т«юСИісђїсѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сђЇсЂеУАеУеўсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсЂїсђЂ т«ЪжџЏсЂФсЂ»сЃЄсЃљсѓцсѓ╣тѕЦсЂ«PVТЋ░сѓњтљѕу«ЌсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂ т«ЪжџЏсЂ«сѓ╗сЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│ТЋ░сѓѕсѓісѓѓтцДсЂЇсЂфтђц№╝ѕPVТЋ░сЂФУ┐ЉсЂётђц№╝ЅсЂФсЂфсѓІтѓЙтљЉсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: A. сЂ»сЂёсђѓТГБсЂЌсЂЈТЈЈућ╗сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓРђІ

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting Data Loss
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Complete Data LossРђІ
searchDocs.content: Complete data loss occurs when all historical data disappears from your QA ZERO dashboard.  Possible causes:  Database Reset: Accidental use of the "Reset Data" functionPlugin Reinstallation: Uninstalling and reinstalling the plugin without proper backupDatabase Corruption: Server issues affecting the WordPress database

searchDocs.title: Partial Data LossРђІ
searchDocs.content: Partial data loss occurs when some data is missing for specific time periods or pages.  Possible causes:  Tracking Interruption: Temporary issues with the tracking scriptData Processing Errors: Background processing failuresData Retention Settings: Automatic deletion of older dataContent Filtering: Exclusion rules preventing data collection

searchDocs.title: Check Data Collection StatusРђІ
searchDocs.content: Navigate to QA ZERO > DashboardCheck the dashboard for recent dataIf recent data is visible, data collection is currently working

searchDocs.title: Verify Recent DataРђІ
searchDocs.content: Navigate to QA ZERO > UserSet the date range to "Today" or "Yesterday"Check if recent data is being recordedIf recent data exists but historical data is missing, the issue is likely with stored data rather than collection

searchDocs.title: Check WordPress DatabaseРђІ
searchDocs.content: Use a database management tool like phpMyAdminCheck the WordPress database tables related to QA ZEROVerify that the tables exist and contain data

searchDocs.title: Review WordPress Error LogsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Check your WordPress error logsLook for errors related to QA ZERONote the timestamps of any relevant errors

searchDocs.title: Data Retention SettingsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO automatically removes old data based on your retention settings:  Navigate to QA ZERO > SettingsSelect the Site Management tabCheck the Data Retention Period settingIf set to a short period (e.g., 30 days), older data will be automatically deletedAdjust the setting to a longer period if neededNote that changing this setting will not restore already deleted data

searchDocs.title: Database IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Database corruption can cause data loss:  Use a database management tool like phpMyAdminCheck the WordPress database tables related to QA ZERORepair or optimize the database tables if needed  For severe database issues:  Check your server's error logs for database-related errorsContact your hosting provider for assistance with database repairRestore from a backup if available

searchDocs.title: Tracking Script IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If the tracking script was temporarily disabled or broken:  Navigate to QA ZERO > TagVerify that the tracking code is properly installedIf using a caching plugin, clear your cacheCheck your site again to see if tracking is working

searchDocs.title: Plugin ConflictsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Other plugins may interfere with QA ZERO's data collection or storage:  Temporarily deactivate other plugins one by oneAfter each deactivation, check if QA ZERO data collection worksIf you identify a conflicting plugin, check the Plugin Compatibility section for specific guidance

searchDocs.title: Server Resource LimitationsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Limited server resources can prevent data processing:  Check your server's PHP memory limit and execution timeEnsure your server meets the minimum requirements (PHP 5.6+, 64MB memory)If resources are limited, contact your hosting provider about upgrading

searchDocs.title: From BackupРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you have a backup of your WordPress database:  Restore the database from backupVerify that QA ZERO tables are included in the backupReactivate the plugin if necessary

searchDocs.title: Using WordPress Database ToolsРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you need to recover data from a corrupted database:  Use a database management tool like phpMyAdminCheck the WordPress database tables related to QA ZERORepair or optimize the database tables if neededIf necessary, consult with a database administrator

searchDocs.title: From Browser CacheРђІ
searchDocs.content: In some cases, limited data may still exist in visitors' browsers:  Note that QA ZERO uses localStorage for some temporary dataThis data is limited and may not represent a complete recovery solutionFor reliable data recovery, always maintain regular database backups

searchDocs.title: Regular BackupsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Set up regular database backups:  Use a WordPress backup plugin or your hosting provider's backup toolsEnsure that database backups include QA ZERO tablesConfigure backup frequency and retentionStore backups in a secure location (local or cloud)

searchDocs.title: Optimize Server ResourcesРђІ
searchDocs.content: Reduce the risk of data processing failures:  Ensure your server meets the minimum requirements (PHP 5.6+, 64MB memory)Consider upgrading your hosting plan if you have a high-traffic siteRegularly check server logs for errors or warningsKeep WordPress and all plugins updated

searchDocs.title: Monitor Site PerformanceРђІ
searchDocs.content: Monitor your site's performance:  Regularly check the QA ZERO dashboard for any anomaliesUse WordPress health check tools to monitor overall site healthSet up uptime monitoring for your websiteRegularly check for plugin conflicts

searchDocs.title: Getting SupportРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you've tried the troubleshooting steps above and still have issues:  Gather information about your system: WordPress versionPHP versionServer environmentQA ZERO plugin version Contact QA ZERO support with: Your system informationDescription of the data lossTime period affectedSteps you've already taken to troubleshoot

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting License Errors
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: Invalid License KeyРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you see an "Invalid License Key" error:    Possible causes:  Typo in License Key: The license key was entered incorrectlyExpired License: The license has expired and needs renewalRevoked License: The license has been revoked due to terms violation

searchDocs.title: License Activation Limit ReachedРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you see a "License Activation Limit Reached" error:    This means you've activated the license on the maximum number of sites allowed by your license tier.

searchDocs.title: Connection ErrorРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you see a "Connection Error" when trying to activate or verify your license:    This indicates that your WordPress site cannot connect to the QA ZERO license server.

searchDocs.title: License Deactivated UnexpectedlyРђІ
searchDocs.content: If your previously activated license shows as deactivated:    This can occur if the license was deactivated from another location or if there are connectivity issues.

searchDocs.title: Verify License KeyРђІ
searchDocs.content: Navigate to QA ZERO > LicenseCheck the license key for typos or extra spacesRe-enter the license key if necessaryClick Activate License

searchDocs.title: Check License StatusРђІ
searchDocs.content: Log in to your QA ZERO account at https://mem.quarka.org/tsushin/Check the status, expiration date, and activation count of your licenseIf expired, renew your license

searchDocs.title: Deactivate Unused SitesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you've reached your activation limit:  Navigate to QA ZERO > LicenseClick Deactivate License to free up an activation slotYou can then activate the license on another site

searchDocs.title: Fix Connection IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you're experiencing connection issues:  Check if your server can connect to the license server at mem.quarka.orgVerify that your server has outbound connection capabilitiesTemporarily disable any security plugins or firewallsContact your hosting provider to ensure they don't block outbound connections

searchDocs.title: Retry License ActivationРђІ
searchDocs.content: If automatic activation fails, you can try these steps:  Navigate to QA ZERO > LicenseCheck your internet connectionVerify that your server can connect to mem.quarka.orgClear your browser cacheTry activating the license again

searchDocs.title: Understanding License TiersРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO offers several license tiers:  Tier	Features	LimitationsFree	Basic analytics, click heatmap	1 page only Friend	Basic analytics, click heatmap	Limited pages Personal	Full analytics, all heatmap types	Standard support Light	Full analytics, all heatmap types	Enhanced support Business	All features + advanced reporting	Priority support Business Plus	All features + AI insights	Premium support Agent	All features + white labeling	Dedicated support Enterprise	Custom solutions	Custom support

searchDocs.title: Upgrading Your LicenseРђІ
searchDocs.content: To upgrade your license:  Log in to your QA ZERO account at https://mem.quarka.org/tsushin/Purchase the new license tierActivate the new license key on your siteYour license will be automatically upgraded

searchDocs.title: Downgrading Your LicenseРђІ
searchDocs.content: To downgrade your license:  Wait until your current license expiresPurchase the lower-tier licenseActivate the new license on your site  Note that downgrading may result in loss of access to certain features.

searchDocs.title: Automatic RenewalРђІ
searchDocs.content: By default, QA ZERO licenses are set to renew automatically:  You will receive email notifications before the renewal dateThe renewal will use the payment method on fileYour license will continue without interruption

searchDocs.title: Manual RenewalРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you've disabled automatic renewal:  Log in to your QA ZERO account at https://mem.quarka.org/tsushin/Purchase a renewal for your licenseYour license will be renewed

searchDocs.title: Renewal BenefitsРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO offers benefits for renewing your license:  Continued access to premium featuresAccess to updates and new featuresOngoing support for your installation

searchDocs.title: Transferring LicensesРђІ
searchDocs.content: To transfer a license to a different site:  Deactivate the license on the current siteNavigate to QA ZERO > License on the new siteEnter your license keyClick Activate License

searchDocs.title: Getting Support for License IssuesРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you continue to experience license issues:  Contact QA ZERO support with: Your license key (last 4 characters only for security)Description of the issueScreenshots of any error messagesSteps you've already taken to troubleshootYour WordPress and PHP versions

searchDocs.title: CookieтљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂесЂ«жђБТљ║№╝ѕсѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕУеГуй«№╝Ѕ
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдРђІ
searchDocs.content: сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂДсЂ»сђЂсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂД Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФ№╝ѕCookie сЃљсЃісЃ╝уГЅ№╝ЅсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ« QA ZERO сЂесЂ«жђБТљ║Тќ╣Т│ЋсЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдУфгТўјсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ сЂЊсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ«СйюТЦГсЂ»СИЇУдЂсЂДсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сЂфсЂюсЂЊсЂ«жђБТљ║№╝ѕсѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕУеГуй«№╝ЅсЂїт┐ЁУдЂсЂфсЂ«сЂІРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂДсЂ»сђЂсѓхсѓцсЃѕУефтЋЈУђЁсЂї Cookie сЂ«тѕЕућесЂФтљїТёЈсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂІсЂЕсЂєсЂІсЂФт┐юсЂўсЂдсђЂ УеѕТИгТќ╣Т│Ћ№╝ѕCookieсѓњСй┐сЂБсЂЪУеѕТИгсЂІСй┐сѓЈсЂфсЂёУеѕТИгсЂІ№╝ЅсѓњтѕЄсѓіТЏ┐сЂѕсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂїсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЮсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсђЂCookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсѓњтѕЕућесЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂДсЂ»сђЂ сѓхсѓцсЃѕУефтЋЈУђЁсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсЂ«ухљТъюсѓњ QA ZERO сЂФжђџуЪЦсЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂ« JavaScript сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕ№╝ѕтљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕ№╝ЅсЂ«УеГуй«сЂїт┐ЁУдЂсЂДсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕсЂ«УеГуй«сЂежаєт║ЈРђІ
searchDocs.content: тљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕсЂ»сђЂ Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂісѓѕсЂ│ ZERO сЂ«сѓ┐сѓ░сЂесЂ«УфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сЂ┐жаєсѓњТёЈУГўсЂЌсЂдУеГуй«сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 1. Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂесЂ«жќбС┐ѓРђІ
searchDocs.content: тљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕсЂ»сђЂ Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФТюгСйЊсЂїУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сЂЙсѓїсЂЪтЙїсЂФт«ЪУАїсЂЋсѓїсѓІт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЮсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсђЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂїТїЄт«џсЂЎсѓІ сђїтљїТёЈуіХТЁІсЂїуб║т«џсЂЌсЂЪсѓ┐сѓцсЃЪсЃ│сѓ░№╝ѕсѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЃљсЃЃсѓ»жќбТЋ░сѓёсѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕ№╝ЅсђЇсЂ«СИГсЂФУеўУ┐░сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 2. ZERO сѓ┐сѓ░тљїтБФсЂ«жаєт║ЈРђІ
searchDocs.content: ZERO сЂФжќбсЂЎсѓІсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ»сђЂТгАсЂ«жаєуЋфсЂДУеГуй«сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░№╝ѕтЁѕ№╝ЅтљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕ№╝ѕтЙї№╝Ѕ  тљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕсЂДсЂ» qahmz_pub.cookieConsent() сЂесЂёсЂє JavaScript жќбТЋ░сѓњтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЊсЂ«жќбТЋ░сЂ»УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░тєЁсЂДт«џуЙЕсЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂ УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сѓњтЁѕсЂФУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сѓЊсЂДсЂісЂЈт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  жаєт║ЈсЂїжђєсЂФсЂфсѓІсЂесђЂ жќбТЋ░сЂїТюфт«џуЙЕсЂ«уіХТЁІсЂДт«ЪУАїсЂЋсѓїсђЂсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂїуЎ║ућЪсЂЎсѓІтЈ»УЃйТђДсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: тљїТёЈжђБТљ║сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕсЂДУАїсЂєсЂЊсЂеРђІ
searchDocs.content: QA ZERO сЂе Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсѓњжђБТљ║сЂЎсѓІта┤тљѕсђЂ сѓхсѓцсЃѕтЂ┤сЂДт«ЪУБЁсЂЎсѓІтєЁт«╣сЂ»ТгАсЂ« 2 уѓ╣сЂДсЂЎсђѓ  qahmz.cookieConsentObject сѓњт«џуЙЕсЂЎсѓІCookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«уіХТЁІсЂФт┐юсЂўсЂд qahmz_pub.cookieConsent() сѓњтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЎ

searchDocs.title: 1. тљїТёЈсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂ«т«џуЙЕРђІ
searchDocs.content: УеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ«тЙїсЂФсђЂТгАсЂ«сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсѓњУеўУ┐░сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  <script> var qahmz = qahmz || {}; qahmz.cookieConsentObject = true; </script>

searchDocs.title: 2. тљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсЂ«жђџуЪЦРђІ
searchDocs.content: Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂїуц║сЂЎтљїТёЈуіХТЁІсЂФт┐юсЂўсЂд С╗ЦСИІсЂ« JavaScript сѓњтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЎсѓѕсЂєсЂФт«ЪУБЁсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  тљїТёЈсЂЌсЂЪсЂесЂЇ qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(true); ТІњтљдсЂЌсЂЪсЂесЂЇ qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(false);

searchDocs.title: т«ЪУБЁсѓцсЃАсЃ╝сѓИ№╝ѕсѓхсЃ│сЃЌсЃФ№╝ЅРђІ
searchDocs.content: С╗ЦСИІсЂ» т«ЪУБЁСЙІ№╝ѕсѓхсЃ│сЃЌсЃФ№╝Ѕ сЂДсЂЎсђѓ т«ЪжџЏсЂ«т«ЪУБЁсЂДсЂ»сђЂсЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂдсѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсѓњУеўУ┐░сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 1) тљїТёЈуіХТЁІсѓњУАесЂЎтђцсѓњуЏ┤ТјЦтЈѓуЁДсЂДсЂЇсѓІта┤тљѕРђІ
searchDocs.content: тцЅТЋ░тљЇ№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џconsentStatus№╝ЅтљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсѓњУАесЂЎтђц№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џ"accepted" / "rejected"№╝Ѕ сЂ»сђЂсЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтЪ║сЂЦсЂёсЂджЂЕтѕЄсЂФт«ЪУБЁсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  <!-- РЉа тљїТёЈсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂ«т«џуЙЕ№╝ѕт┐ЁсЂџТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> var qahmz = qahmz || {}; qahmz.cookieConsentObject = true; </script> <!-- РЉА тљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсЂ«жђџуЪЦ№╝ѕCookieтљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂдТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> if (consentStatus === "accepted") { qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(true); } else if (consentStatus === "rejected") { qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(false); } </script>

searchDocs.title: 2) сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЃљсЃЃсѓ»жќбТЋ░сЂ«т╝ЋТЋ░сЂесЂЌсЂдтљїТёЈуіХТЁІсЂїТИАсЂЋсѓїсѓІта┤тљѕРђІ
searchDocs.content: сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЃљсЃЃсѓ»тєЁсЂД qahmz_pub.cookieConsent() сѓњтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЃљсЃЃсѓ»жќбТЋ░тљЇ№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џonCookieConsentChange№╝Ѕт╝ЋТЋ░сЂ«тйбт╝Ј№╝ѕtrue/false сЂфсЂ«сЂІсђЂТќЄтГЌтѕЌсЂфсЂ«сЂІ№╝Ѕ сЂ»сђЂсЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтЪ║сЂЦсЂёсЂджЂЕтѕЄсЂФт«ЪУБЁсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  <!-- РЉа тљїТёЈсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂ«т«џуЙЕ№╝ѕт┐ЁсЂџТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> var qahmz = qahmz || {}; qahmz.cookieConsentObject = true; </script> <!-- РЉА тљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсЂ«жђџуЪЦ№╝ѕCookieтљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂдТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> window.onCookieConsentChange = function(consent) { qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(consent); }; </script>

searchDocs.title: 3) сѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕсЂесЂЌсЂдтљїТёЈуіХТЁІсЂїжђџуЪЦсЂЋсѓїсѓІта┤тљѕРђІ
searchDocs.content: сѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕсЃфсѓ╣сЃісЃ╝тєЁсЂД qahmz_pub.cookieConsent() сѓњтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕтљЇ№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џcookieConsent№╝ЅсѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂ«ТДІжђа№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џe.detail.agreed№╝Ѕ сЂ»сђЂсЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтЪ║сЂЦсЂёсЂджЂЕтѕЄсЂФт«ЪУБЁсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  <!-- РЉа тљїТёЈсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂ«т«џуЙЕ№╝ѕт┐ЁсЂџТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> var qahmz = qahmz || {}; qahmz.cookieConsentObject = true; </script> <!-- РЉА тљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсЂ«жђџуЪЦ№╝ѕCookieтљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсЂФтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂдТЏИсЂЈ№╝Ѕ --> <script> window.addEventListener('cookieConsent', function(e) { qahmz_pub.cookieConsent(e.detail.agreed); }); </script>   Рђ╗ тљїТёЈуіХТЁІсЂ«тЈќтЙЌТќ╣Т│Ћ№╝ѕтцЅТЋ░тљЇсЃ╗тђцсЃ╗сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЃљсЃЃсѓ»тљЇсЃ╗сѓцсЃЎсЃ│сЃѕтљЇсЂфсЂЕ№╝ЅсЂ»сђЂ т┐ЁсЂџсЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ« Cookie тљїТёЈсЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ«С╗ЋТДўсѓњсЂћуб║УфЇсЂ«сЂєсЂѕт«ЪУБЁсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: ТгАсЂФУАїсЂєсЂЊсЂеРђІ
searchDocs.content: сѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕУеГуй«тЙїсђЂт«ЪжџЏсЂ«сѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂДсђїтљїТёЈ№╝ЈТІњтљдсђЇсЂ«ТЊЇСйюсѓњУАїсЂёсђЂТЃ│т«џсЂЕсЂісѓісЂФтІЋСйюсЂЎсѓІсЂІуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓУеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ«УеГуй«сЂїсЂЙсЂасЂ«та┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂсђїУеѕТИгсѓ┐сѓ░сЂ«УеГуй«сђЇсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсѓњтЁѕсЂФ уб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: Troubleshooting Recording Issues
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: No Data Being RecordedРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you're not seeing any data in your QA ZERO dashboard:  Verify Tracking is EnabledРђІ  Navigate to QA ZERO > SettingsSelect the Site Management tabEnsure tracking options are enabledSave changes if needed  Check Script InstallationРђІ  Visit your website in an incognito/private browsing windowRight-click and select "View Page Source"Search for "qa-zero" in the source codeVerify the tracking script is present in the <head> or before the closing </body> tag    If the script is missing:  Navigate to QA ZERO > TagVerify that the tracking code is properly installedIf using a caching plugin, clear your cacheCheck your site again  Check for JavaScript ErrorsРђІ  Open your website in Chrome or FirefoxOpen the browser's developer tools (F12 or right-click > Inspect)Go to the Console tabLook for any errors related to QA ZERO

searchDocs.title: Partial Data RecordingРђІ
searchDocs.content: If some data is being recorded but not all:  Check Tracking ConfigurationРђІ  Navigate to QA ZERO > SettingsSelect the Site Management tabVerify that all desired tracking options are enabledSave changes if needed  Check Site ConfigurationРђІ  Navigate to QA ZERO > SettingsReview the settings in all tabs to ensure proper configurationMake sure your site type and attributes are correctly setSave changes if needed

searchDocs.title: Heatmap Not Displaying CorrectlyРђІ
searchDocs.content: If heatmaps are not displaying correctly on your pages:  Check Page CompatibilityРђІ  Navigate to QA ZERO > BehaviorSelect the page with the problematic heatmapCheck if the page content has changed significantly since data collectionIf needed, clear old data and collect new heatmap data  Adjust Browser ViewРђІ  Navigate to QA ZERO > BehaviorSelect the page with the problematic heatmapTry switching between device views (desktop, tablet, mobile)Check if the heatmap displays correctly in different views

searchDocs.title: ChromeРђІ
searchDocs.content: If recording issues occur specifically in Chrome:  Check if any ad blockers or privacy extensions are installedVerify that third-party cookies are allowedTry disabling any content blocking features

searchDocs.title: SafariРђІ
searchDocs.content: Safari's Intelligent Tracking Prevention (ITP) can affect analytics:  QA ZERO is designed to work with Safari's privacy featuresNo special configuration is typically neededIf issues persist, check for browser-specific console errors

searchDocs.title: FirefoxРђІ
searchDocs.content: If recording issues occur specifically in Firefox:  Check if Enhanced Tracking Protection is blocking QA ZEROQA ZERO is designed to work with Firefox's privacy featuresIf issues persist, check for browser-specific console errors

searchDocs.title: Plugin Conflict ResolutionРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you suspect a plugin conflict:  Temporarily deactivate other plugins one by oneAfter each deactivation, check if QA ZERO recording worksIf you identify a conflicting plugin, check the Plugin Compatibility section for specific guidance

searchDocs.title: PHP SettingsРђІ
searchDocs.content: Ensure your server meets these requirements:  PHP 5.6 or higherMemory limit: 64MB or higherMax execution time: 30 seconds or higherPOST max size: 8MB or higher

searchDocs.title: WordPress ConfigurationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Check these WordPress settings:  Ensure WordPress address (URL) and Site address (URL) are correctly set in Settings > GeneralVerify that permalink settings are configured and working

searchDocs.title: Manual Script VerificationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Add this code to your theme's header.php file (before the closing </head> tag) to force the tracking script:  <?php if (function_exists('qahm_zero_print_tracking_code')) { qahm_zero_print_tracking_code(); } ?>

searchDocs.title: Database VerificationРђІ
searchDocs.content: Use a database management tool like phpMyAdminCheck the WordPress database tables related to QA ZEROVerify that the tables exist and contain dataIf issues are found, consider reinstalling the plugin

searchDocs.title: Getting SupportРђІ
searchDocs.content: If you've tried the troubleshooting steps above and still have issues:  Gather information about your system: WordPress versionPHP versionServer environmentBrowser and device information Contact QA ZERO support with: Your system informationDescription of the issueSteps you've already taken to troubleshootScreenshots of any error messages

searchDocs.title: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ№╝ѕсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕуЅѕ№╝Ѕ
searchDocs.keywords: QA ZERO  WordPress  analytics  heatmap  documentation

searchDocs.title: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂесЂ»РђІ
searchDocs.content: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂ»сђЂQA ZEROсЂДУеѕТИгсЃ╗УЊёуЕЇсЂЋсѓїсЂЪсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓњсѓѓсЂесЂФсђЂ уіХТ│ЂсЂ«ТЋ┤уљєсѓёУђЃт»ЪсђЂТћ╣тќёТцюУејсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсЂ«ТЮљТќЎсѓњтЙЌсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂ«С╗ЋухёсЂ┐сЂДсЂЎсђѓ  QA ZEROсЂїтЈјжЏєсЂЌсЂЪсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓњAIсЂїУфГсЂ┐тЈќсѓісѓёсЂЎсЂётйбсЂФТЋ┤уљєсЂЌсђЂ сЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљсѓёуЈЙуіХТііТЈАсђЂТќйуГќТцюУејсѓњУАїсЂєжџЏсЂ«УБютіЕТЃЁта▒сЂесЂЌсЂдТ┤╗ућесЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: С║ІтЅЇсЂФућеТёЈсЂЎсѓІсѓѓсЂ«РђІ
searchDocs.content: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтѕЕућесЂЎсѓІсЂФсЂ»сђЂС║ІтЅЇсЂФС╗ЦСИІсЂ«ТЃЁта▒сЃ╗уњ░тбЃсѓњсЂћућеТёЈсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  Googleсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтѕЕућесЂДсЂЇсѓІуњ░тбЃ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљТЎѓсЂФсђЂсѓ╣сѓ»сЃфсЃЌсЃѕт«ЪУАїсЂ«Уе▒тЈ»сѓњТ▒ѓсѓЂсѓЅсѓїсЂЙсЂЎуцЙтєЁсЂДтЁ▒ТюЅсЂЌсЂдтѕЕућесЂЎсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂУеГуй«та┤ТЅђсѓётЁ▒ТюЅТќ╣Т│ЋсѓњС║ІтЅЇсЂФсЂћТцюУејсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё QA ZERO сЂ« API ТјЦуХџТЃЁта▒ APIсѓесЃ│сЃЅсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сЃѕ№╝ѕZEROсЂ«сЃђсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎ№╝ЅTracking ID№╝ѕZEROсЂ«сЃђсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎ№╝ЅAPIсЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝тљЇAPIсЃЉсѓ╣сЃ»сЃ╝сЃЅ Рђ╗сЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝тљЇсЃ╗сЃЉсѓ╣сЃ»сЃ╝сЃЅсЂ»сђЂZEROт░јтЁЦТЎѓсЂФтѕЦжђћсЂіуЪЦсѓЅсЂЏсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎ

searchDocs.title: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂ«тѕЕућесЂ«ТхЂсѓїРђІ
searchDocs.content: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂ«тѕЕућесЂ»сђЂС╗ЦСИІсЂ«2сЂцсЂ«Т«хжџјсЂФтѕєсЂІсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  тѕЮтЏъсЂ«сЂ┐т┐ЁУдЂсЂфУеГт«џсЃ╗УфЇУе╝ сЂ»сЂўсѓЂсЂдAIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњСйюТѕљсЂЎсѓІжџЏсЂФУАїсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ GoogleсѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂ«УфЇУе╝сѓёсђЂсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐тЈќтЙЌсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсЂ«тѕЮТюЪУеГт«џсЂїтљФсЂЙсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ жђџтИИсЂ«сЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљ тѕЮТюЪУеГт«џсЂїт«їС║єсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓїсЂ░сђЂС╗ЦжЎЇсЂ»сЃАсЃІсЃЦсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅт«ЪУАїсЂЎсѓІсЂасЂЉсЂД AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњСйюТѕљсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 1. тѕЕућесЂЎсѓІсѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сЃќсЃЕсѓдсѓХсѓњуб║УфЇсЂЎсѓІРђІ
searchDocs.content: AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕућесЂ«Googleсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсЂ»сђЂ сЂЊсЂ«сЂѓсЂетѕЕућесЂЎсѓІGoogleсѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂ«GoogleсЃЅсЃЕсѓцсЃќСИісЂФСйюТѕљсЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЮсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсђЂAIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтѕЕућесЂЎсѓІжџЏсЂ»сђЂ сѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтѕЕућесЂЎсѓІС║ѕт«џсЂ«GoogleсѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂДсЃГсѓ░сѓцсЃ│сЂЌсЂЪ сЃќсЃЕсѓдсѓХсЂІсѓЅ QA ZERO сЂФсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 2. сЃєсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЎсѓІРђІ
searchDocs.content: СйюТѕљсЂЎсѓІAIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњжЂИТіъсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂ сЃєсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃѕсЂесЂфсѓІGoogleсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсЂїжќІсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЃАсЃІсЃЦсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅ сЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФ Рєњ сѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сѓњСйюТѕљ сѓњжЂИТіъсЂЌсђЂ сЃєсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЌсЂдсђЂAIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕућесЂ«сѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсѓњСйюТѕљсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 3. т┐ЁУдЂсЂфТЃЁта▒сѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЎсѓІ№╝ѕ_config сѓисЃ╝сЃѕ№╝ЅРђІ
searchDocs.content: сѓ│сЃћсЃ╝СйюТѕљсЂЌсЂЪсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсѓњжќІсЂЇсђЂ _config сѓисЃ╝сЃѕсЂФ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљсЂФт┐ЁУдЂсЂфТЃЁта▒сѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  С╗ЦСИІсЂ«жаЁуЏ«сѓњсђЂсЂЮсѓїсЂъсѓїтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  API_ENDPOINT QA ZERO сЂ«сЃђсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІ сђїAPIсѓесЃ│сЃЅсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сЃѕсђЇсѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЌсЂдтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ API_USERNAME QA ZERO т░јтЁЦТЎѓсЂФсЂіуЪЦсѓЅсЂЏсЂЌсЂЪ APIсЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝тљЇсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ API_PASSWORD QA ZERO т░јтЁЦТЎѓсЂФсЂіуЪЦсѓЅсЂЏсЂЌсЂЪ APIсЃЉсѓ╣сЃ»сЃ╝сЃЅсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ TRACKING_ID QA ZERO сЂ«сЃђсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІ сђїTracking IDсђЇсѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЌсЂдтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ GOAL_NUMBERS№╝ѕС╗╗ТёЈ№╝Ѕ AIсЂІсѓЅсѓбсЃЅсЃљсѓцсѓ╣сѓњтЈЌсЂЉсЂЪсЂёуЏ«ТеЎсЂїсЂѓсѓІта┤тљѕсЂФтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ уЏ«ТеЎуЋфтЈисЂ»сђЂ УеГт«џ №╝ъ уЏ«ТеЎ №╝ъсђїуЏ«ТеЎ1сђЇсђїуЏ«ТеЎ2сђЇсЂфсЂЕсЂ«уЋфтЈисЂїУЕ▓тйЊсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ SITE_NAME сѓхсѓцсЃѕтљЇсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ AIсЂФуіХТ│ЂсѓњС╝ЮсЂѕсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂ«ТЃЁта▒сЂесЂЌсЂдСй┐ућесЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ SITE_GOAL сѓхсѓцсЃѕсЂ«уЏ«уџёсѓёуЏ«ТеЎсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ AIсЂїсѓѕсѓіжЂЕсЂЌсЂЪУдќуѓ╣сЂДУђЃт»ЪсЃ╗ТЈљТАѕсѓњУАїсЂєсЂЪсѓЂсЂ«ТЃЁта▒сЂесЂЌсЂдСй┐ућесЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 4. AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњСйюТѕљсЂЎсѓІРђІ
searchDocs.content: сѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕСИіжЃесЂ«сЃАсЃІсЃЦсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ Рєњ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљ сѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  тѕЮтЏът«ЪУАїТЎѓсЂФсЂ»сђЂGoogleсѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂИсЂ«сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣Уе▒тЈ»сЂїТ▒ѓсѓЂсѓЅсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ ућ╗жЮбсЂ«ТАѕтєЁсЂФтЙЊсЂБсЂдУфЇУе╝сѓњУАїсЂБсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ Рђ╗СИђт║дУфЇУе╝сѓњУАїсЂѕсЂ░сђЂС╗ЦжЎЇсЂ«т«ЪУАїТЎѓсЂФтєЇт║дУфЇУе╝сЂїТ▒ѓсѓЂсѓЅсѓїсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂ»сЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓ  УфЇУе╝сЂїт«їС║єсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљсЂ«уб║УфЇућ╗жЮбсЂїУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ т»ЙУ▒АТюѕсѓњжЂИТіъсЂЌсђЂсђїсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљсђЇсѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ    сЂЮсЂ«тЙїсђЂQA ZERO сЂІсѓЅсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«тЈќтЙЌсЂїтДІсЂЙсѓісђЂ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСйюТѕљсЂФт┐ЁУдЂсЂфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂїсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕСИісЂФтЄ║тіЏсЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«тЄ║тіЏсЂФсЂ»сђЂТЋ░тѕєсЂІсЂІсѓІта┤тљѕсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: 5. AIсѓцсЃ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЃЕсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЎсѓІРђІ
searchDocs.content: сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«тЄ║тіЏсЂїт«їС║єсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂ сѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕСИісЂФсђїсѓцсЃ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЃЕсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓњсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сђЇсЂеУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ    тЁесЂдсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝ сѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂдсђЂ AIсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕућесЂ«сѓцсЃ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЃЕсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсЃЌсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЂФсѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  сЂЊсЂ«сѓцсЃ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЃЕсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂФсЂ»сђЂ AIсЂФсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«тєЁт«╣сѓётЅЇТЈљТЮАС╗ХсѓњТГБсЂЌсЂЈС╝ЮсЂѕсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂ«ТЃЁта▒сЂїтљФсЂЙсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.content: сЂіСй┐сЂёсЂ«AIсЂесЂ«сЃЂсЃБсЃЃсЃѕућ╗жЮбсѓњжќІсЂЇсђЂ сѓ│сЃћсЃ╝сЂЌсЂЪсѓцсЃ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЃЕсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓњсЂЮсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙУ▓╝сѓіС╗ўсЂЉсЂдсђЂУ│фтЋЈсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ  сЂЙсЂЪсђЂсѓѕсѓіУЕ│сЂЌсЂЈуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂЪсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ СйюТѕљсЂЌсЂЪсѓ╣сЃЌсЃгсЃЃсЃЅсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсѓњ Excel тйбт╝ЈсЂДсЃђсѓдсЃ│сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂЌсђЂ AIсЂИсЂ«Ти╗С╗ўУ│ЄТќЎсЂесЂЌсЂдТЅ▒сЂєсЂЊсЂесѓѓсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ  т┐ЁУдЂсЂФт┐юсЂўсЂдсђЂ сђїТ░ЌсЂФсЂфсѓІуѓ╣сѓњТЋ┤уљєсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђЇ сђїТћ╣тќёсЂ«сЃњсЃ│сЃѕсѓњТЋЎсЂѕсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђЇ сЂфсЂЕсђЂУ┐йтіасЂ«У│фтЋЈсѓњсЂЌсЂдсЂ┐сЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сѓ╣сЃєсЃЃсЃЌ1№╝џуЏ«ТеЎсЂ«тљЇтЅЇсЂеуе«жАъсЂ«жЂИТіъРђІ
searchDocs.content: уЏ«ТеЎсЂ«тљЇтЅЇ у«АуљєсЂЌсѓёсЂЎсЂётљЇуД░№╝ѕСЙІ№╝џсЂітЋЈсЂётљѕсѓЈсЂЏт«їС║єсђЂУ│ЄТќЎУФІТ▒ѓсЃюсѓ┐сЃ│сЂфсЂЕ№╝ЅсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ ТюѕжќЊсЂ«уЏ«ТеЎС╗ХТЋ░№╝ѕС╗╗ТёЈ№╝Ѕ 1сЃХТюѕжќЊсЂДжЂћТѕљсЂЌсЂЪсЂёсѓ│сЃ│сЃљсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│ТЋ░сѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓтЁЦтіЏсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂсђїуЏ«ТеЎсђЇсЂ«сЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕућ╗жЮбсЂФсђЂтљёуЏ«ТеЎсЂЮсѓїсЂъсѓїсЂ«сђїуЈЙтюесђЇсЂесђїуЏ«ТеЎС╗ХТЋ░сђЇсѓњТБњсѓ░сЃЕсЃЋсЂДУАеуц║сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓуЏ«ТеЎсЂФт»ЙсЂЌсЂджаєУф┐сЂІсЂЕсЂєсЂІсЃЉсЃЃсЂеУдІсЂдТііТЈАсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсђї0сђЇсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсЂДсѓѓУеѕТИгсЂФТћ»жџюсЂ»сЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓ уЏ«ТеЎтђц№╝ѕС╗╗ТёЈ№╝Ѕ сѓ│сЃ│сЃљсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│1С╗ХсЂѓсЂЪсѓісЂ«ТюЪтЙЁтЈјуЏі№╝ѕтБ▓СИітЇўСЙАсЂфсЂЕ№╝ЅсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓтЁЦтіЏсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕСИісЂДуЇ▓тЙЌжЄЉжАЇсЂ«сѓисЃЪсЃЦсЃгсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂїУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІсѓѕсЂєсЂФсЂфсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ№╝ѕтљёсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕућ╗жЮбсЂ«УАеСИГсЂ«сђїуЏ«ТеЎтђцсђЇсѓњсЂћУдДсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё№╝Ѕсђї0сђЇсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсЂДсѓѓУеѕТИгсЂФТћ»жџюсЂ»сЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓ уЏ«ТеЎсѓ┐сѓцсЃЌ№╝џС╗ЦСИІсЂ«2уе«жАъсЂІсѓЅжЂИТіъсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ тѕ░жЂћсЃџсЃ╝сѓИ№╝џуЅ╣т«џсЂ«сЃџсЃ╝сѓИ№╝ѕсѓхсЃ│сѓ»сѓ╣сЃџсЃ╝сѓИуГЅ№╝ЅсѓњУАеуц║сЂЌсЂЪТЎѓсЂФсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»№╝џуЅ╣т«џсЂ«сЃюсѓ┐сЃ│сѓёсЃфсЃ│сѓ»сѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂЪТЎѓсЂФсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.title: сѓ╣сЃєсЃЃсЃЌ2№╝џУЕ│у┤░ТЮАС╗ХсЂ«УеГт«џРђІ
searchDocs.content: A.сђїтѕ░жЂћсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсђЇсЂ«та┤тљѕРђІ  СИђУЄ┤ТЮАС╗Х№╝џ сђїтЅЇТќ╣СИђУЄ┤сђЇ№╝џТїЄт«џсЂЌсЂЪТќЄтГЌтѕЌсЂІсѓЅтДІсЂЙсѓІURLсЂЎсЂ╣сЂдсђѓсђїт«їтЁеСИђУЄ┤сђЇ№╝џURLсЂїт«їтЁесЂФСИђУЄ┤сЂЎсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ«сЂ┐сђѓ т»ЙУ▒АURL№╝џуЏ«ТеЎсЂесЂЎсѓІсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ«URLсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ    B. сђїсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сђЇсЂ«та┤тљѕРђІ  т»ЙУ▒АURL№╝џсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»у«ЄТЅђсЂїтГўтюесЂЎсѓІсЃџсЃ╝сѓИсЂ«URLсѓњтЁЦтіЏсЂЌсђЂсђїсЃџсЃ╝сѓИУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сЂ┐сђЇсѓњсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓУдЂу┤асЂ«ТїЄт«џ№╝џућ╗жЮбСИІжЃесЂФУАеуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІсЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝СИісЂДсђЂуЏ«ТеЎсЂесЂЌсЂЪсЂёсЃюсѓ┐сЃ│сѓёсЃфсЃ│сѓ»сѓњуЏ┤ТјЦсѓ»сЃфсЃЃсѓ»сЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓУЄфтІЋсЂДсѓ╗сЃгсѓ»сѓ┐№╝ѕHTMLУдЂу┤асЂ«та┤ТЅђ№╝ЅсЂїтЁЦтіЏсЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

searchDocs.content: УеГт«џсЂЌсЂЪуЏ«ТеЎсЂ«сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ»сђЂтидсЃАсЃІсЃЦсЃ╝сЂ« [уЏ«ТеЎ] сЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂІсѓЅуб║УфЇсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ
